text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days before the Spring Fan Fest...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You seriously think I'd wanna do that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume never refuse to join the Fan Fest... If
they've debuted, it's always been kind of a given
that they'd have fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is a rare opportunity for them to thank their
supporters up close in person, and generally,
both sides are really excited about it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Races depend on spectators, and therefore
fan-orientated events are held regularly in order
to build and maintain fan loyalty."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Even that explanation doesn't quite make sense
to me. What's the point?
choice_data_list:
A lot of people get strength from their
supporters.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well not me. They don't affect my
performance in the least.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
They're just more noise. I'd prefer they just shut
up and let me focus on the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Shakur has fans, sadly, their voices
aren't reaching her. She blocks out all the noise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's out of character, considering she usually
prides herself on acting rationally. She doesn't
need to be grateful for her fans, but I wish she'd
at least realize they're out there.
choice_data_list: Any chance we could make a deal?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I don't think so. Kick and scream all you
want, but there's nothin' in it for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I have to have to resort to bribing her, but...
choice_data_list: I hear the new U-MAX226s are dropping soon!
I hear the new U-MAX226s are dropping soon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
U-MAX226 is a sneaker line that Air Shakur is
particularly fond of. They're quite popular among
the younger generations.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, they are. What about it?
choice_data_list: I'll wait in line for you if you do the Fan Fast.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You will, will you? And what if I say I don't need
you to?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I could just preorder a pair. Which means I don't
have to resort to negotiating with you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Check and mate.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...But you know what? Whatever. I'll give it a go.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But I'm only gonna show up. I won't be competing
or anythin'.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah? It's a deal, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as she's there, the voices of her fans will
surely reach her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the day of the Fan Fest arrives. Air
Shakur is...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ugh, it's so loud.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Nah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following that, I resume my efforts to convince
Shakur to participate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I somehow manage to talk her into to
joining the Fan Fest. But...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, it's Air Shakur! I didn't know she came to these
things.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Oooh, she's so intense.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being an event hosted by Tracen Academy, most
of the attendees are friendly faces. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ahhh. I see what you're up to.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're tryin' to give me a shot of motivation,
aren't ya?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Show me I got nothing but hate comin' my way.
Interesting.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll bite. I'll scare the hell out of everyone
at the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm going back now. You can stay here if you
want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her interpreting it in the exact opposite
way I meant it, this may have actually been the
best way to strengthen Air Shakur's resolve.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Oh... She left.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
I should've gone and talked to her. I know Shakur
doesn't like people bothering her, but...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Still... I wanted to tell her I'll be cheering for her at the
spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Fine. If the terms are right.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's actually good timing. There's something I've
been wantin' to try.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's an event where the trainers race each
other this year.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Just for fun, I put together a training schedule for
humans once as a thought exercise.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've never tested it, though... So? Sounds like fun,
right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're not liftin' your legs enough. There's no
point if you don't. Go do five more laps.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, check it out. That's one of the students
from Tracen Academy. Must be a race coming up
because she's really going all out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You're draggin' your feet again. You wanna
run even more laps?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Hold on a second... Is that the trainer running?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I follow the training plan that Air Shakur
devised for a few days, until...

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Aaand they're off! The 1,600-meter trainer race
has begun!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Used to calling the shots, now the trainers are
putting their expertise to the test as they power
through this 1,600-meter course!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
They're onto the final stretch! Which of our fierce
trainers will claim victory?

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! One trainer is surging forward with
incredible speed!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: There it is.

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Aaand just like that, everyone else has been left
in the dust! And the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey. Not bad.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Still, there's room for improvement. If we start
prepping for the next race right n—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch, listen to me. What's the point in thinking
about next time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I somehow manage to talk her into to
joining the Fan Fest. But...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, it's Air Shakur! I didn't know she came to these
things.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Oooh, she's so intense.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being an event hosted by Tracen Academy, most
of the attendees are friendly faces. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ahhh. I see what you're up to.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're tryin' to give me a shot of motivation,
aren't ya?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Show me I got nothing but hate comin' my way.
Interesting.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll bite. I'll scare the hell out of everyone
at the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm going back now. You can stay here if you
want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her interpreting it in the exact opposite
way I meant it, this may have actually been the
best way to strengthen Air Shakur's resolve.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Oh... She left.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
I should've gone and talked to her. I know Shakur
doesn't like people bothering her, but...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Still... I wanted to tell her I'll be cheering for her at the
spring Tenno Sho.
